# Ivan Petrov

## Summary
Backend engineer with 6 years building Python web services and data pipelines.

## Experience

### Senior Backend Engineer, DataForge GmbH (2021 to present)
- Built and operated REST APIs in Python with FastAPI serving 2M requests per day.
- Designed PostgreSQL schemas and optimized queries, cutting p95 latency by 40%.
- Containerized services with Docker and ran them on a Kubernetes cluster.

### Backend Developer, Nordwind AG (2018 to 2021)
- Developed Flask services and background workers processing payment events.
- Introduced automated testing with pytest, raising coverage from 20% to 75%.
